summary: Booking.com exposes Demand API v3.1/v3.2 REST endpoints authenticated with `Authorization: Bearer <API key token>` plus `X-Affiliate-Id`, a Connectivity HTTP API authenticated either by a short-lived bearer JWT minted from machine-account Client ID/Secret or by legacy Basic auth machine-account credentials, and a public no-auth MCP server at `https://demandapi-mcp.booking.com/v1/mcp/8132308`.
